questionHtml:
Which of the following is the electron configuration of a metallic element?

A.  [Ne] 3s2 3p2

B.  [Ne] 3s2 3p4

C.  [Ne] 3s2 3p6 3d3 4s2

D.  [Ne] 3s2 3p6 3d10 4s2 4p5

meta.title: Which of the following is the electron configuration of a metallic element? A. [Ne] 3s2 3p2 B. [Ne] 3s2 3p4 C. [Ne] 3s2 3p6 3d3 4s2 D. [Ne] 3s2 3p6 3d10 4s2 4p5
